title: bromus marginatus var. breviaristatus
intro: Bromus marginatus var. breviaristatus, also known as Hardy Brome or Mountain Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bromus marginatus var. breviaristatus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
